title: OpenCode Agent Manifest
description: Canonical schema for agent manifest files in agents/ directory. Derived from agent-registry.py runtime consumer requirements.

name.description: Lowercase-kebab agent name. Must match filename without .yaml extension.

description.description: One-line summary of the agent's purpose and trigger keywords.

mode.description: Whether this is a primary agent (user-facing) or subagent (delegated to).

triggers.description: Phrases that activate this agent. Recommended for discoverability.

anti_triggers.description: Phrases that should NOT route to this agent.

mcp.description: MCP tools this agent can use. Can be an array of tool names OR an object mapping tool names to permission values.

escalation.description: When/how to escalate to other agents.

handoff_targets.description: Agents this agent can hand off to.

prompt_file.description: Path to the agent's prompt file (.md).

steps.description: Max steps for this agent's session.

tone.description: Tone/persona instructions. Can be a string or an object with tone properties.

never_do.description: Explicit anti-patterns the agent must avoid.

guardrails.description: Safety guardrails the agent must respect.
